state.reentry_reason: User requested another Ralph loop against the full proposal checklist after compare-depth backend approval.
state.current_iteration_notes: Architect rejection closed by replacing caster boxes with real GL/VK brush, alias, and MD5 caster geometry; fitting sun cascades to frustum splits with texel snapping; applying Vulkan receiver normal-offset bias parity; and making cache mode 2 literal world-only reuse by excluding entity casters from cached page rendering.
state.completion_notes: Ralph loop completed with architect approval. OMX state/ai-slop-cleaner/cancel tools were unavailable in this session, so state was maintained manually, deslop was a changed-file manual pass, and the ledger was marked inactive.
state.reentry_2026_04_30T21_00_03Z: User requested another Ralph loop. Iteration 4 reopened the ledger for a fresh checklist audit, verification pass, and architect gate.
state.iteration_4_notes: Fixed stale baseline wording that still described frontend caster boxes. Fresh code search, build, install refresh, staged smokes, cache-mode-2 dumps, and architect re-review all passed.

todos.description: Implement backend-neutral shadow replacement baseline and guardrails.
Document the canonical replacement contract and keep the roadmap current.
Run fresh build/regression checks and obtain architect verification.
Implement visible native OpenGL shadow page allocation, rendering, and sampling.
Implement native Vulkan shadow page allocation/render integration without redirecting to OpenGL.
Run final builds/regression checks, architect verification, and cleanup pass.
Classify remaining proposal checklist items against the current implementation and close blocking gaps.
Add proposal-level shadow debug dumps/counters/materialization reporting.
Complete remaining quality-policy items such as tracked light class semantics, moment filter handling/reporting, and exclusion/alpha policy.
Update implementation documentation and roadmap with full-plan completion evidence.
Run final full-plan build/regression/smoke checks and obtain fresh architect verification.

verification.targeted_renderers: ninja -C builddir-win worr_opengl_x86_64.pdb worr_vulkan_x86_64.pdb passed after replacing caster boxes, fitting cascades, and adding Vulkan normal-offset parity
verification.full_build: iteration 4 ninja -C builddir-win passed and linked all targets; ninja emitted a non-fatal 'premature end of file; recovering' warning with exit 0
verification.install_refresh: iteration 4 python tools/refresh_install.py --build-dir builddir-win --install-dir .install --base-game basew --platform-id windows-x86_64 refreshed and validated .install
verification.python: iteration 4 python -m py_compile tools/shadowmapping_repro_smoke.py tools/check_shadowmapping_guardrails.py passed
verification.spirv: iteration 4 spirv-val passed individually for .tmp/vk_world_shadow.vert.spv, .tmp/vk_world_shadow.frag.spv, and .tmp/vk_shadow_moment.frag.spv
verification.tests: iteration 4 meson test -C builddir-win --print-errorlogs reported no tests defined
verification.smoke: iteration 4 staged tools/shadowmapping_repro_smoke.py moving-bmodel + translated-md2 PCF and sun-cascade VSM/EVSM/PCSS exited 0 for OpenGL and Vulkan
verification.dry_run: tools/shadowmapping_repro_smoke.py --dry-run emitted the expected staged command
verification.diff_check: git diff --check passed with line-ending warnings only
verification.cache_mode_2_runtime: iteration 4 staged OpenGL cache mode 2 dump had global casters=27 dynamic=27 with all four views at casters=0 dynamic=0; staged Vulkan sun cache mode 2 dump had global casters=38 dynamic=38 with all three cascades at casters=0 dynamic=0
verification.architect: APPROVED by Pauli in iteration 4 after the baseline doc correction; no architectural blockers found
verification.deslop: oh-my-codex ai-slop-cleaner unavailable via tool_search; manual changed-file deslop scan found no cleanup edits needed, so iteration 4 build/smoke evidence remains post-cleanup evidence
verification.state_cleanup: Ralph active=false because /cancel/state_clear tooling was unavailable
